brief_nursing_elaboration: Throat inflammation from viral/bacterial infection. Nursing: throat culture coordination, antibiotic admin, analgesic provision, swallowing assessment, fever monitoring.
Prostate gland inflammation from infection. Nursing: urinary symptom assessment, antibiotic efficacy monitoring, pain management, PSA testing coordination, urinary retention care.
BP <90/60 mmHg causing decreased perfusion. Nursing: orthostatic assessment, IV fluid administration, fall prevention, Trendelenburg positioning, shock precautions.
Profuse sweating from fever/anxiety/MI. Nursing: temperature monitoring, linen changes, dehydration assessment, underlying cause evaluation, anxiety management.
Elevated WBC indicating infection/leukemia/stress. Nursing: infection precautions, CBC trending, fever management, underlying cause investigation, left shift assessment.
Albuminuria from kidney disease/pregnancy/infection. Nursing: urinalysis 24-hr collection, renal function assessment, BP monitoring, dietary protein evaluation, proteinuria trending.
Core temp <35°C from exposure/shock/sepsis. Nursing: gradual rewarming (avoid afterdrop), ECG monitoring for J-waves, fluid avoidance, atrial fib precautions.
Excessive daytime somnolence from narcolepsy/sleep apnea/medications. Nursing: sleep study coordination, stimulant medication admin, safety precautions, driving evaluation.
Tissue overgrowth (muscle/prostate/heart/LVH). Nursing: functional assessment, medication efficacy monitoring, symptom management, surgical intervention readiness.
Pleural effusion from CHF/cirrhosis/malignancy. Nursing: thoracentesis support, breath sound monitoring, diuretic efficacy, underlying cause treatment, respiratory compromise.

prefix_meaning: Named after Bartolomeo Eustachi - auditory tube
brief_nursing_elaboration: Auditory tube inflammation affecting pressure regulation/hearing. Nursing: otalgia relief, nasal decongestant admin, hearing assessment, ear fullness evaluation, autoinflation techniques.
Myocardial inflammation from viral/autoimmune/drug-induced. Nursing: cardiac enzyme monitoring, arrhythmia detection, activity restriction, heart failure precautions, ECG serial.
Kidney disease from diabetes/hypertension/glomerulonephritis. Nursing: renal function monitoring, BP control, proteinuria assessment, dietary management, fluid restriction education.
Heart disease from various etiologies (ischemic/dilated/restrictive). Nursing: cardiac output monitoring, medication management, activity tolerance assessment, weight monitoring.
Liver disease from cirrhosis/hepatitis/fatty liver. Nursing: LFT monitoring, ammonia levels, ascites assessment, bleeding precautions, dietary protein modification.
Joint disease from osteoarthritis/rheumatoid/septic arthritis. Nursing: pain management, ROM exercises, mobility aids, weight reduction education, medication adherence.
Spinal inflammation from infection/ankylosing spondylitis. Nursing: back pain assessment, imaging coordination, antibiotics/NSAIDs, mobility assistance, neurological checks for cord compression.
Joint immobilization/fusion surgery. Nursing: post-op pain management, immobilization compliance, ROM limitations, mobility device training, rehabilitation coordination, fusion integrity monitoring.
Stomach removal for cancer/ulcer/obesity. Nursing: post-op nutrition management, dumping syndrome precautions, small frequent meals, vitamin supplementation, wound care, anastomosis monitoring.
Kidney dysfunction from diabetes/hypertension. Nursing: renal function tests, creatinine monitoring, urinalysis, BP management, ACE inhibitor administration.
Lymphatic fluid buildup from node removal/blockage. Nursing: compression therapy, lymphatic drainage massage, limb elevation, infection prevention, psychosocial support.
Liver enlargement from cirrhosis/infection/malignancy. Nursing: palpation assessment, abdominal girth monitoring, LFT assessment, fluid retention evaluation, portal hypertension monitoring.
Spleen enlargement from infection/hemolysis/malignancy. Nursing: abdominal palpation precaution, trauma prevention, CBC monitoring, left-sided pain assessment, splenic rupture precautions.
Kidney enlargement from hydronephrosis/polycystic disease/malignancy. Nursing: renal function monitoring, back pain assessment, urinary obstruction evaluation, ultrasound coordination.
Heart chamber dilation from CHF/cardiomyopathy. Nursing: cardiac output monitoring, dyspnea assessment, diuretic admin, fluid restriction education, EF monitoring.
Elevated BP >140/90 mmHg chronically. Nursing: BP monitoring, antihypertensive efficacy, lifestyle modification education, target organ damage assessment, medication adherence.
Spontaneous/traumatic lung collapse from air entry. Nursing: O2 therapy, chest tube insertion support, breathing comfort, anxiety management, breath sound monitoring.
Pancreatic inflammation from alcohol/gallstones/medications. Nursing: NPO status, pain management, lipase monitoring, insulin/enzyme supplementation, fluid management, dietary fat restriction.
Brain inflammation from viral/bacterial/fungal infection. Nursing: neurological assessment q2-4h, fever management, seizure precautions, neuro imaging coordination, CSF analysis.

literal_translation: Inflammation of the heart's outer layer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Pericardium inflammation causing chest pain/friction rub/effusion. Nursing: chest pain assessment, pericardiocentesis support, cardiac monitoring, activity restriction, NSAIDs/colchicine admin.

literal_translation: Inflammation of the heart's inner layer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Endocardium infection from bacteria/fungal on valves. Nursing: blood culture coordination, IV antibiotic admin, fever management, cardiac monitoring, sepsis precautions, emboli assessment.

root_2_meaning: Greek: syn = together + ova = egg (synovial fluid)
brief_nursing_elaboration: Tendon sheath inflammation from repetitive use/infection. Nursing: immobilization support, anti-inflammatory meds, ROM exercises coordination, pain assessment, infection monitoring.

literal_translation: Inflammation of bone and bone marrow
brief_nursing_elaboration: Bone/marrow infection from bacterial hematogenous/direct spread. Nursing: blood culture collection, IV antibiotics, pain management, limb elevation, infection precautions, wound care.
Low platelet count increasing bleeding risk. Nursing: bleeding precautions, platelet transfusion coordination, petechiae assessment, stool guaiac monitoring, bleeding prevention education.
Liver palpable below costal margin. Nursing: assess cause (CHF/cirrhosis), monitor LFTs, educate on disease process, assess for ascites and portal hypertension.
Lymphatic fluid accumulation from node removal/blockage. Nursing: compression therapy, lymphatic massage, elevation, infection prevention, psychosocial support, volume measurement.
Impaired stomach emptying from diabetes/post-surgery. Nursing: small frequent meals, prokinetic meds, blood glucose control, nutritional supplementation, NG tube if severe.
Irregular heartbeat from SA/AV node/ventricular dysfunction. Nursing: continuous cardiac monitoring, rhythm strip analysis, medication admin (antiarrhythmics), pacemaker/ICD consideration.
Irregular cardiac rhythm from electrolyte imbalance/ischemia/hypoxia. Nursing: ECG monitoring, electrolyte replacement, medication admin, defibrillation readiness, patient education.
Elevated serum K+ >5.5 mEq/L from renal/medication causes. Nursing: ECG monitoring for peaked T-waves, calcium gluconate/insulin/glucose/kayexalate admin, potassium-sparing diuretic restriction.
Low serum K+ <3.5 mEq/L from diuretics/diarrhea/vomiting. Nursing: ECG monitoring for flattened T-waves, potassium supplementation, dietary sources, arrhythmia precautions.
Elevated serum Na+ >145 mEq/L from dehydration/diabetes insipidus. Nursing: free water supplementation, gradual correction, thirst assessment, neurological monitoring, ADH replacement if needed.

Low serum Na+ <135 mEq/L from SIADH/excessive hypotonic fluids. Nursing: fluid restriction, hypertonic saline if symptomatic, seizure precautions, gradual correction to avoid central pontine myelinolysis.
Elevated serum Ca+ >10.5 mg/dL from hyperparathyroidism/malignancy. Nursing: hydration with normal saline, diuretics, bisphosphonates admin, neurological monitoring, renal function assessment.
Low serum Ca+ <8.5 mg/dL from hypoparathyroidism/renal disease/vitamin D deficiency. Nursing: calcium supplementation, vitamin D admin, seizure precautions, ECG monitoring for prolonged QT.
Blood glucose <70 mg/dL from insulin excess/skipped meals. Nursing: fast-acting carbohydrate admin, glucose monitoring, recheck in 15 min, glucagon if unable to eat, diabetes education.
Blood glucose >180 mg/dL from diabetes/infection/stress. Nursing: insulin administration, blood glucose monitoring, fluid intake encouragement, diabetic ketoacidosis precautions, diet modification.
Rapid/hurried eating leading to choking risk/indigestion. Nursing: eating pace monitoring, small bites encouragement, thorough chewing emphasis, aspiration precautions, anxiety assessment.
Esophageal inflammation/ulceration from GERD/infection/caustic ingestion. Nursing: NPO or soft diet, antacid/PPI admin, pain assessment, swallowing difficulty evaluation, endoscopy coordination.

literal_translation: Inflammation of stomach and small intestine
brief_nursing_elaboration: GI inflammation from viral/bacterial/food-borne pathogen. Nursing: anti-emetic admin, fluid/electrolyte replacement, stool assessment, hydration monitoring, hand hygiene education, isolation if infectious.
Cartilage degeneration in weight-bearing joints from aging/wear. Nursing: pain management, ROM exercises, weight reduction, assistive devices, joint protection, acetaminophen/NSAIDs admin.

Autoimmune polyarticular inflammation. Nursing: early morning stiffness assessment, DMARDs admin, immunosuppressive monitoring, CRP/ESR trending, joint damage prevention, splinting, psychological support.
